learnings.content: Use type hints on all function signatures. Never write a function without return type annotation.
Use dataclasses or Pydantic models for structured data — avoid plain dicts for complex objects.
Use pathlib.Path instead of os.path for all file system operations.
Context managers (with statement) for all file and connection handling. Never forget to close resources.
Use f-strings for string formatting. Avoid % formatting and .format() in new code.
Write tests with pytest. Use fixtures for shared state, not setUp/tearDown.
Use virtual environments. Never install packages globally. Use pyproject.toml with poetry or hatch.
